patthana4.5:1.1.pli: Kusalaṁ sārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kusalo sārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana4.5:2.1.pli: Akusalaṁ sārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo sārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana4.5:3.1.pli: Abyākataṁ sārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato sārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:4.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, ārammaṇe tīṇi …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:6.1.pli: Kusalo sārammaṇo dhammo kusalassa sārammaṇassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana4.5:7.1.pli: Akusalo sārammaṇo dhammo akusalassa sārammaṇassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana4.5:8.1.pli: Abyākato sārammaṇo dhammo abyākatassa sārammaṇassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana4.5:9.1.pli: Kusalo sārammaṇo dhammo kusalassa sārammaṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:10.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā satta, anantare satta …pe… sahajāte aññamaññe nissaye tīṇi, upanissaye nava, āsevane tīṇi, kamme pañca, vipāke ekaṁ, āhāre …pe… sampayutte tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:12.1.pli: Abyākataṁ anārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato anārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:16.1.pli: Abyākato anārammaṇo dhammo abyākatassa anārammaṇassa dhammassa sahajātapaccayena paccayo … aññamaññapaccayena paccayo … nissayapaccayena paccayo … āhārapaccayena paccayo … indriyapaccayena paccayo … atthipaccayena paccayo … avigatapaccayena paccayo (sabbattha ekaṁ. Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:17.1.pli: Kusalo citto dhammo kusalassa cittassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:18.1.pli: Ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā satta, anantare satta …pe… upanissaye nava, āsevane tīṇi, natthiyā satta, vigate satta. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:21.1.pli: Kusalaṁ nocittaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kusalo nocitto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana4.5:22.1.pli: Akusalaṁ nocittaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo nocitto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana4.5:25.1.pli: Akusalaṁ nocittañca abyākataṁ nocittañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato nocitto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana4.5:27.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe tīṇi, adhipatiyā nava …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Sahajātavārampi …pe… sampayuttavārampi paṭiccavārasadisaṁ.)

patthana4.5:28.1.pli: Kusalo nocitto dhammo kusalassa nocittassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:29.1.pli: Hetuyā satta, ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā dasa …pe… avigate terasa. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:37.1.pli: Abyākato cetasiko dhammo abyākatassa cetasikassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana4.5:41.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā satta, anantare satta …pe… sahajāte aññamaññe nissaye tīṇi, upanissaye nava, āsevane tīṇi, kamme pañca, vipāke ekaṁ, āhāre …pe… sampayutte tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:48.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana4.5:49.1.pli: Nahetuyā ekaṁ, naārammaṇe pañca, novigate pañca.

patthana4.5:51.1.pli: Kusalaṁ cittasampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… kusalaṁ cittasaṁsaṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… kusalaṁ cittasamuṭṭhānaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… kusalaṁ cittasahabhuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… kusalaṁ cittānuparivattiṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… kusalaṁ cittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… kusalaṁ cittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānasahabhuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… kusalaṁ cittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānānuparivattiṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kusalo cittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānānuparivatti dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:55.1.pli: Hetuyā ekaṁ, sahajāte ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.5:68.1.pli: Āhāre ekaṁ, indriye atthiyā avigate ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:34.1.pli: Hetuyā ekaṁ, ārammaṇe ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:36.1.pli: Kusalaṁ asaṅkiliṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kusalo asaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Kusalaṁ asaṅkiliṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato asaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Kusalaṁ asaṅkiliṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kusalo asaṅkiliṭṭho ca abyākato asaṅkiliṭṭho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana4.6:37.1.pli: Abyākataṁ asaṅkiliṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato asaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Kusalaṁ asaṅkiliṭṭhañca abyākataṁ asaṅkiliṭṭhañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato asaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana4.6:38.1.pli: Kusalaṁ asaṅkiliṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kusalo asaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo uppajjati ārammaṇapaccayā.

patthana4.6:39.1.pli: Abyākataṁ asaṅkiliṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato asaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo uppajjati ārammaṇapaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:40.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:42.1.pli: Kusalo asaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo kusalassa asaṅkiliṭṭhassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo … tīṇi.

patthana4.6:43.1.pli: Abyākato asaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo abyākatassa asaṅkiliṭṭhassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana4.6:44.1.pli: Kusalo asaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo kusalassa asaṅkiliṭṭhassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … dve.

patthana4.6:45.1.pli: Abyākato asaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo abyākatassa asaṅkiliṭṭhassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … dve. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:46.1.pli: Hetuyā cattāri, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā pañca, anantare cattāri …pe… sahajāte pañca, aññamaññe dve, nissaye satta, upanissaye cattāri, purejāte pacchājāte āsevane dve, kamme cattāri, vipāke ekaṁ, āhāre …pe… magge cattāri, sampayutte dve, vippayutte tīṇi …pe… avigate satta. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:48.1.pli: Akusalaṁ kilesasampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo kilesasampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkiliṭṭhadukasadisaṁ.)

patthana4.6:49.1.pli: Akusalaṁ kilesañceva saṅkilesikañca dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo kileso ceva saṅkilesiko ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:52.1.pli: Kusalaṁ saṅkilesikañceva no ca kilesaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kusalo saṅkilesiko ceva no ca kileso dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana4.6:53.1.pli: Akusalaṁ saṅkilesikañceva no ca kilesaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo saṅkilesiko ceva no ca kileso dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana4.6:54.1.pli: Abyākataṁ saṅkilesikañceva no ca kilesaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato saṅkilesiko ceva no ca kileso dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana4.6:55.1.pli: Kusalaṁ saṅkilesikañceva no ca kilesañca abyākataṁ saṅkilesikañceva no ca kilesañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato saṅkilesiko ceva no ca kileso dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana4.6:56.1.pli: Akusalaṁ saṅkilesikañceva no ca kilesañca abyākataṁ saṅkilesikañceva no ca kilesañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato saṅkilesiko ceva no ca kileso dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:57.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe tīṇi …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:59.1.pli: Kusalo saṅkilesiko ceva no ca kileso dhammo kusalassa saṅkilesikassa ceva no ca kilesassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo … tīṇi.

patthana4.6:60.1.pli: Abyākato saṅkilesiko ceva no ca kileso dhammo abyākatassa saṅkilesikassa ceva no ca kilesassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:61.1.pli: Hetuyā cattāri, ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā nava …pe… avigate terasa. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Yathā kusalattike pañhāvāraṁ, evaṁ vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana4.6:62.1.pli: Akusalaṁ kilesañceva saṅkiliṭṭhañca dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo kileso ceva saṅkiliṭṭho ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:63.1.pli: Hetuyā ekaṁ, ārammaṇe ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:65.1.pli: Akusalaṁ saṅkiliṭṭhañceva no ca kilesaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo saṅkiliṭṭho ceva no ca kileso dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana4.6:68.1.pli: Akusalaṁ kilesañceva kilesasampayuttañca dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo kileso ceva kilesasampayutto ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana4.6:71.1.pli: Akusalaṁ kilesasampayuttañceva no ca kilesaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo kilesasampayutto ceva no ca kileso dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:74.1.pli: Kusalaṁ kilesavippayuttaṁ saṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kusalo kilesavippayutto saṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Kusalaṁ kilesavippayuttaṁ saṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato kilesavippayutto saṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Kusalaṁ kilesavippayuttaṁ saṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kusalo kilesavippayutto saṅkilesiko ca abyākato kilesavippayutto saṅkilesiko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana4.6:75.1.pli: Abyākataṁ kilesavippayuttaṁ saṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato kilesavippayutto saṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana4.6:76.1.pli: Kusalaṁ kilesavippayuttaṁ saṅkilesikañca abyākataṁ kilesavippayuttaṁ saṅkilesikañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato kilesavippayutto saṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:77.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:79.1.pli: Kusalo kilesavippayutto saṅkilesiko dhammo kusalassa kilesavippayuttassa saṅkilesikassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo … tīṇi.

patthana4.6:80.1.pli: Abyākato kilesavippayutto saṅkilesiko dhammo abyākatassa kilesavippayuttassa saṅkilesikassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:81.1.pli: Hetuyā cattāri, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā cattāri …pe… avigate satta. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Yathā kusalattike pañhāvāraṁ, evaṁ vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana4.6:82.1.pli: Kusalaṁ kilesavippayuttaṁ asaṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kusalo kilesavippayutto asaṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana4.6:83.1.pli: Abyākataṁ kilesavippayuttaṁ asaṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato kilesavippayutto asaṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana4.6:84.1.pli: Hetuyā dve …pe… āsevane vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate dve. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:86.1.pli: Kusalo kilesavippayutto asaṅkilesiko dhammo kusalassa kilesavippayuttassa asaṅkilesikassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana4.6:87.1.pli: Abyākato kilesavippayutto asaṅkilesiko dhammo abyākatassa kilesavippayuttassa asaṅkilesikassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana4.6:88.1.pli: Hetuyā dve, ārammaṇe dve, adhipatiyā tīṇi, anantare dve …pe… upanissaye cattāri …pe… kamme tīṇi, vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate dve. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)
